final_prompt.prompt:
Create a WeChat official account article cover image for a fragrance new product launch campaign titled "染秋".

Style/medium: needs a high-end, luxurious quality aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be centered composition with the title as the dominant focal element
Subject: must include the fragrance product launch theme "染秋香氛新品发布"
Scene/backdrop: needs an autumnal atmosphere — exact backdrop treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs an elegant, refined atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm autumnal direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a premium, high-quality surface treatment — exact grain / sheen / weight is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋" (large, primary title), "秋意染染 时光留香" (secondary subtitle)
Constraints: must preserve 900×500 horizontal aspect ratio; title text must be visually dominant
Avoid:
